political.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: FEC: $26K PAC donations; 59% to Republican, 41% to Democratic committees.

labor.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: 114 federal penalties totaling $124.1M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 35/100; CHRB 9.8/26; TVPRA exposure; AU MS statement.

charity.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: $25M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue) via Kraft Heinz Foundation. Operates the Kraft Heinz Company Foundation: $2.9M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: environmental violation: $10.9M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: BBFAW 2024 Tier 4 — policy established but limited audited progress disclosure. [BBFAW Tier 4]

execPay.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 170:1 — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

health.s: Via parent company Kraft Heinz: 8 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the presence of aspergillus mold spores were discovered on the products.
